post.subject: My Name is George W Bush
post.body: Green Day Fucking Rocked!! SETLIST * 'American Idiot' * 'Jesus Of Suburbia' * 'Holiday' * 'Are We The Waiting?' * 'St Jimmy' * 'Longview' * 'Hitchin' A Ride' * 'Brainstew' / 'Jaded' * 'Knowledge' * 'Basket Case' * 'She' * 'King For A Day' * 'Wake Me Up When September Ends' * 'Minority' * 'Boulevard Of Broken Dreams' * 'When I Come Around' * 'We Are The Champions' * 'Good Riddance (Time Of Your Life)'
